Name: search_news
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "search_news" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."search_news"("search" := $1) AS "_fn_search_news" WHERE "_fn_search_news"."is_public" = $2::bool ORDER BY "created_at" DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."content" AS "content") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
